title: OpenTelemetry Java Agent Instrumentation
description: Schema for OpenTelemetry Java Agent instrumentation metadata in the ecosystem registry.

name.description: The unique name of the instrumentation (e.g., akka-actor-2.3).

description.description: Brief description of what is being instrumented and how.

features.description: List of telemetry features provided (e.g., TRACING, METRICS, CONTEXT_PROPAGATION).

has_javaagent.description: Indicates if this instrumentation is compatible with the OpenTelemetry Java Agent.

javaagent_target_versions.description: Maven coordinates and version ranges of libraries supported by this instrumentation.

library_link.description: URL to the documentation or homepage of the instrumented library.

source_path.description: Relative path to the instrumentation source code in the opentelemetry-java-instrumentation repository.

tags.description: Searchable tags associated with this instrumentation.

github_url.description: Direct link to the instrumentation's source code.
